summary: Implemented Stage 10E official Codex automation bridge dry-run with pure proposal dataclasses, deterministic proposal IDs, validation findings, a codex-automation-dry-run CLI, focused no-mutation tests, and file-purpose manifest coverage.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_codex_automation.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 374 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

A helper can build normalized automation.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/codex_automation.py defines build_codex_automation_bridge_dry_run and default_codex_automation_bridge_specs. tests/test_codex_automation.py covers queue reconciliation and project health check proposals without Codex-home or planning mutations.

Proposals carry official automation_upda.evidence: CodexAutomationBridgeProposal carries proposal_id, action_status, name, kind, destination, rrule, prompt, execution_environment, cwds, status, model, reasoning_effort, source provenance, and official_payload with automation_update-compatible keys.

CLI consumes explicit workspace and sche.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/cli.py exposes codex-automation-dry-run with --workspace-root, --queue-reconciliation-rrule, --health-check-rrule, and --json. Tests assert JSON output and Codex-home sentinel no-mutation.

Invalid schedules, unsupported automatio.evidence: tests/test_codex_automation.py covers invalid_rrule, unsupported_automation_kind, unsupported_destination, missing_workspace_root, and duplicate_proposal_name findings while preserving valid proposals.

Focused tests cover proposal generation,.evidence: Focused pytest coverage passed, and scripts/check_file_justification.py records the new helper, tests, and worker-result artifact.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 10E automation bridge dry-run diff.

risks: This slice intentionally emits proposals only; real automation creation or updates still require the official Codex automation tool in a later reviewed/apply step.
RRULE validation is intentionally conservative and only accepts hourly or weekly cron schedules plus minute/daily/weekly heartbeat schedules.
The default proposals use local workspace execution and do not yet model setup configs or worktree automation setup review.
follow_up_tasks: Shape a Stage 10F reviewed automation apply/proposal-export step that invokes official Codex automation tooling only after explicit approval.
Decide whether automation proposal artifacts should be linked as reviewed planning evidence before creation.
Extend automation bridge schedules only after official tooling requirements are confirmed for additional RRULE forms.
handoff_notes: Stage 10E adds a pure dry-run surface for official Codex automation proposals. It does not create or update automations; it produces reviewed payloads for later official-tool application.
